channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Ondo, JPMorgan, Mastercard and Ripple Team to Settle Tokenized Treasuries on XRP Ledger
item.description: Major financial institutions use XRP Ledger to demonstrate blockchain's ability to settle tokenized Treasuries across borders in seconds.

item.title: OKX to Launch OpenAI, SpaceX and Anthropic Perpetual Futures in Pre-IPO Trading Push
item.description: Crypto exchange OKX will offer synthetic exposure to private AI and tech company valuations through derivatives contracts.

item.title: Anthropic signs Elon Musk's SpaceX for Colossus 1 compute ahead of June IPO
item.description: The Claude maker said Wednesday it would use all the compute capacity at SpaceX's Colossus 1 data center, the latest partnership stitched onto its AI infrastructure buildout.

item.title: Eric Trump takes shot at JPMorgan rethinking bitcoin after 'crapping' on asset
item.description: The U.S. president's son, who co-founded American Bitcoin, said there's been a turnaround from traditional institutional firms now embracing bitcoin.

item.title: Claude Delusion? Richard Dawkins Believes AI May Be Conscious
item.description: The evolutionary biologist says extended exchanges with Anthropic’s chatbot felt less like software and more like interacting with another mind.

item.title: Price predictions 5/6: BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, BCH, ZEC
item.description: Bitcoin sellers may show up if BTC hits $84,000, but altcoin charts continue to predict new price highs.

item.title: Switzerland's Amina becomes first regulated bank to custody Canton Coin
item.description: The FINMA-regulated bank's institutional clients will get access to trading and holding Canton Coin through a banking platform instead of crypto-native venues.

item.title: The time is now: the Senate must act on crypto market structure legislation
item.description: The United States needs to finally establish a clear framework that the market needs.

item.title: Bermuda pushes stablecoin payments with USDC airdrop as it courts crypto firms, regulators
item.description: Premier David Burt said Bermuda's "onchain economy" plan aims to bring stablecoins into everyday commerce.

item.title: Crypto bill won't move without a ban on officials' industry ties, says U.S. Senator Gillibrand
item.description: The Democratic lawmaker has been a negotiator for the Clarity Act, and one of the final sticking points is the crypto constraint on officials, including the president.

item.title: Google DeepMind Takes Stake in 'Eve Online' Maker, Will Use Game to Test AI Behavior
item.description: The wild world of space simulation game Eve Online will soon become an AI research destination for Google DeepMind thanks to a new deal.

item.title: The end of ads: Coinbase engineer says AI agents could kill the internet’s favorite business model
item.description: Erik Reppel, who created the x402 protocol, said that the web economy depends heavily on advertising revenue generated from humans. AI agents bypass that system entirely.

item.title: Ether tests $2.4K as accumulators add 246K ETH: How high can price go?
item.description: Ether could rise as high as $3,500 in the coming days, fueled by rising balances in Ethereum accumulation wallets and a strengthening technical structure.

item.title: Kevin O’Leary says Wall Street’s tokenization boom is all talk without crypto rules
item.description: O’Leary says institutional investors still see tokenization as too risky without clear U.S. crypto regulation and compliance standards.

item.title: Crypto Long & Short: In quiet crypto markets, yield is the trade
item.description: In this week’s Crypto Long & Short Newsletter, Maxime Seiler notes that weak crypto prices mask adoption, making yield strategies the main trade. Then, Kavita Maharaj‑Alexander writes on crypto’s next phase being driven by proving complian…

item.title: Strategy Yield ETN Gives UK Investors Exposure to Bitcoin Giant's STRC Shares
item.description: The 21Shares exchange-traded note gives U.K. investors exposure to preferred shares of top Bitcoin treasury firm, Strategy.

item.title: Reform UK’s Farage Claims 'No Obligation' to Declare Tether Billionaire's $6.7M Gift
item.description: Farage insisted that the gift from Christopher Harborne was for his personal security and had been reviewed “from every legal angle.”

item.title: Bitcoin price rejects at $83K as Trump calls Iran deal 'big assumption'
item.description: Bitcoin price action failed to revisit the $83,000 mark after US-Iran war tensions took over to steer the crypto market mood.

item.title: The legal risks and practical considerations of digital asset blacklisting
item.description: When digital assets are frozen, holders can suddenly be deprived of access to their legitimate assets or income. Here’s what to know to keep your digital holdings safe.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Someone is front-running this war. At 3:40 AM, a $920 million short hit crude oil. Seventy minutes later, Axios broke that the US and Iran were closing in on a deal. Oil dropped 12%. That single trade: $125 million in profit. Minutes after that, Iran - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBwZUxQUGFaRjhhbU1NdGV1THlrdzhNdGthT3dCeVFmVlBzNUt3Nk05alYyWEJLR2c0QzdtZ0hIMC1VZGlZa0pYYkFqU0YxLUFXZzhNNHAwYk50czdYS3pWdkpB?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇺🇸 Someone is front-ru…

item.title: The Protocol: AI Agents form their own firm
item.description: Also: Alpenglow upgrade update, Ripple on North Korea hacking threat, Cloudflare on AI agents and web economics

item.title: Morgan Stanley takes on crypto trading rivals with E*Trade pilot
item.description: The Wall Street bank is charging 50 basis points per crypto trade, below basic retail pricing at Coinbase, Robinhood and Charles Schwab.

item.title: Hut 8 shares jump over 30% on news of $9.8 billion AI data center lease
item.description: Bitcoin miner expands into AI infrastructure with long-term hyperscale contract in Texas, which includes options that could increase the total value of the agreement to over $25 billion.

item.title: Consensus Miami Day 2: Real-time coverage and highlights from on the ground
item.description: It's day two of Consensus Miami 2026 on Wednesday. Stay tuned for updates throughout the day.

item.title: Stablecoin industry opposes Bank of England’s unhosted wallet ban
item.description: The crypto industry in the UK has come out against the Bank of England’s proposed policy that would ban custodial wallets for stablecoins.

item.title: Anthropic Deploys AI Agents to Tackle Wall Street's Most Tedious Work
item.description: Anthropic released 10 ready-to-run templates targeting some of finance's most time-consuming tasks—from building pitchbooks to closing the books at month-end.

item.title: SHOTS FIRED: Morgan Stanley is rolling out crypto trading on its E*Trade platform for 50bps/trade, undercutting Schwab's 75bps (who undercut Coinbase). If I know Schwab, they likely won't let this stand. Others will prob undercut too. By the time the dust settl - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE91RlpHVlB4THducl9uejBkYWVsaW9WVWs4U3VwSE5CWm5Dc3RGczF3cXpSV3UzbWhidi1meHMxV29CTzRURmRNbWc3cy1lWmY1Tzc3ZGticTVnVnBWUk5TUW1yUE4?oc=5" target="_blank">SHOTS FIRED: Morgan Stanley is …

item.title: Hut 8 Shares Hit All-Time High Price as Bitcoin Miner Signs $9.8 Billion AI Data Center Lease
item.description: Hut 8’s second hyperscale AI campus lease deal covers the first phase of a sprawling Nueces County complex that was originally meant to fuel Bitcoin mining.

item.title: NYSE tokenization partners warn synthetic stock tokens could mislead retail traders
item.description: Offshore synthetic tokens may not represent the underlying equity, use company names without approval, and exploit regulatory arbitrage.

item.title: Apple Agrees to $250 Million Settlement Over AI Claims—Here's Who Can Get Paid
item.description: Tech giant Apple has agreed to pay $250 million to settle claims it misled consumers about its AI system's capabilities.

item.title: OpenTrade raises $17M as CEO sees stablecoin yield tailwinds
item.description: OpenTrade raised $17 million to expand its stablecoin yield platform, bringing total funding above $30 million as it scales stablecoin yield infrastructure for global clients.

item.title: Why stablecoins and SWIFT may have to coexist
item.description: Remittance firms are using crypto to bypass parts of traditional settlement infrastructure, but this does not mean SWIFT is disappearing.

item.title: Samsung SDS wins deal to build South Korea’s blockchain securities system: Report
item.description: The Korea Securities Depository platform is expected to go live by February 2027, aligning with South Korea’s incoming security token framework.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Index jumps 2.5%, continuing higher
item.description: Near Protocol (NEAR) surged 16% and Internet Computer (ICP) gained 10.4%, leading index higher.

item.title: Zcash price may hit $800 as $2.7B hedge fund reveals ‘significant position’ in ZEC
item.description: Robinhood’s ZEC listing, easing US–Iran tensions and a shrinking liquid supply of tokens are further strengthening the bullish outlook for Zcash in the coming weeks.

item.title: 🔥 HUGE: Uniswap hits $3T all-time volume on Ethereum. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB1LU1YVERIdS1BbUlSVnY1eXNaOWk3djJHWUxfOVBtRFJqd0E4WHlmX3VhVnI3c21tVm81YVlOQjdfWTU3QndxckNBMUVXN19oRF9temRvSkdvMTZaRHVBYlV5Z2E?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 HUGE: Uniswap hits $3T all-t…

item.title: OpenTrade raises $17 million to connect stablecoins to real-world assets
item.description: The a16z-backed stablecoin yield and RWA lending platform’s funding round was led by Mercury Fund and Notion Capital.

item.title: Memecoin trades carry rare 'seven-leg' parlay odds, BONK's Nom says at Consensus
item.description: The BONK core contributor argued memecoins skipping ETF and public-company rails end up rinsing retail.

item.title: LAS VEGAS, May 6, 2026 — CleanSpark, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSK) (“CleanSpark” or the “Company”), today released its unaudited Bitcoin mining and operations update for the month ended April 30, 2026.“April was another strong month that reinforced our confide - x.com

item.title: Morning Minute: Crypto Majors Rally, Oil Falls on Renewed Peace Hopes
item.description: Oil is down 14% and broader markets are soaring. Coinbase is cutting 14% of its workforce. And is Michael Saylor going to finally sell some Bitcoin?

item.title: Colombia wants to mine bitcoin with surplus renewable energy
item.description: President Gustavo Petro said Colombia's Caribbean coast could host bitcoin mining facilities powered by surplus renewable energy, following a path similar to Paraguay.

item.title: Zcash bets turn into second-largest liquidations behind bitcoin as ZEC rockets 30%
item.description: The privacy coin extended its multi-month rally on Tuesday with $46.7 million in shorts liquidated, after Multicoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position.

item.title: Bubblemaps flags MYSTERY token over 90-wallet launch sniping cluster
item.description: Bubblemaps said it identified a large wallet cluster that accumulated 90% of the Mystery token’s supply at launch, raising concerns around the token’s distribution.

item.title: Morgan Stanley brings crypto trading with lower fees than rivals
item.description: The bank is rolling out crypto trading on E*Trade with lower fees than Coinbase, Robinhood and Schwab, according to Bloomberg.

item.title: Bitcoin Jumps to Three-Month High Above $82K on Report of US-Iran Agreement
item.description: Bitcoin's jumped as WTI crude fell 10%, on reports that the U.S. has prepared a on-page memorandum of understanding to end the war in Iran.

item.title: Linea contributes ZK rollup stack to Linux Foundation open-source group
item.description: Linea Consortium board director Declan Fox said the move gives its technology a neutral, foundation-governed home.

item.title: Bullish’s Equiniti deal could remake it into a tokenization powerhouse, Clear Street says
item.description: Compass Point took a more cautious stance, reiterating a Neutral rating and $36 target, saying much of the expected growth is already priced in, though it acknowledged potential upside.

item.title: JUST IN: $2 trillion Morgan Stanley launches crypto trading on its E*Trade platform. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE9vSnczSEotb0xERHN5S3hGWXpNNjFKYmM3OHZfcmlBWURSQV9yNzhPem9ldmJUMWFGYUVMbEhVYXBncWR2RkVUVy1yTExMMGwyb29qY0QzZHBLaE1ucHJVR2tn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: $2 trillion Morgan Stanle…

item.title: Bitcoin short-term holder cost basis eyes $92K as next price target
item.description: Bitcoin’s onchain data suggests that the upside may not be over for BTC price, but resistance at $84,000 could delay the recovery.

item.title: Zcash Leads Privacy Coin Surge With 37% Gains on MultiCoin Investment
item.description: MultiCoin Capital disclosed a significant ZEC position, citing wealth seizure risks as a catalyst for private assets.

item.title: Coinbase faces lawsuit over frozen funds from $55M crypto theft
item.description: The plaintiff says Coinbase froze traceable assets from a 2024 DAI phishing theft but refused to return them without a court order.

item.title: BREAKING: Morgan Stanley is launching Bitcoin trading on E*Trade to its 8.6 million clients with cheaper fees than Coinbase and Charles Schwab — Bloomberg 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE14dEFVajZBcjk0Tjc3NXFlZUhtTTcxQnp1OHdZWXl5aDQ0dHY2ZjFTLXpxMlFoT2ZaYlhMVjA3cWNka09XU2pQbGtpczZuanZyU3Nycmc3cGVmRGNqMFNqZWdBeUcxMEU?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Morgan Stanley is…

item.title: Where to Build: A Data-Driven Guide to Blockchain Infrastructure for TradFi Tokenization
item.description: This blog is a preview of our forthcoming report, “The New Rails: How Digital Assets Are Reshaping the Foundations of… The post Where to Build: A Data-Driven Guide to Blockchain Infrastructure for TradFi Tokenization appeared first on Chai…

item.title: CME Group to launch regulated Bitcoin volatility futures
item.description: CME to launch CFTC‑regulated Bitcoin Volatility futures in June, giving institutions an onshore way to trade implied BTC volatility.

item.title: Bitcoin can crash to $50K if 'most critical' bear market test fails: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin price analysis saw $84,000 as bulls' "most critical" reclaim target as the risk of new $50,000 lows returned to the radar.

item.title: Strategy Mulls Selling Bitcoin to 'Inoculate the Market': Saylor
item.description: The largest corporate Bitcoin holder is reconsidering its “never sell” stance, with analysts weighing the ripple effects.

item.title: World’s first live map of token concentration: InsightX launches Atlas Live
item.description: A new era of on-chain trading transparency. Atlas Live enables traders to analyze token concentration and spot potential rug pulls. Now in real time.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs add nearly $1B as BTC surges past $80K in multi-day rally
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted $999 million in inflows over two trading days as Bitcoin moved back above $80,000.

item.title: OKX Card data shows crypto is paying for everyday life in Europe
item.description: OKX Card data shows most crypto spending in Europe is on groceries and dining, signaling growing everyday use over luxury purchases.
